codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies VAL-LOG-001, VAL-LOG-002, VAL-LOG-003. Structured JSON logging to stderr works correctly with timestamp, level, message, traceId fields. --log-level flag supports debug/info/warn/error with info as default. UUID v4 traceId generation works with MAPJ_TRACE_ID override. Unit tests pass (10/10).

issues.description: traceID package-level variable is not thread-safe. Concurrent calls to GenerateTraceID() could race. However, since mapj is a CLI with sequential command execution, this is low risk in practice.
parseLevel silently defaults invalid level strings to info without warning. Consider logging a warning for invalid levels to help users identify configuration errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md specifies zap.String('cmd', ...) for command field, but implementation uses zap.String('command', cmdPath) in fields.go. This inconsistency between documented convention and actual implementation is minor but should be aligned.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md logging convention shows 'zap.String("cmd", "tdn search")' but internal/logging/fields.go:23 uses 'zap.String("command", cmdPath)'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Backend-worker skill exists at .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md but transcript suggests skill was not initially found during implementation. Worker proceeded correctly without skill guidance, suggesting possible transient issue or path resolution problem during session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker completed implementation successfully despite initial skill lookup issue

summary: Feature zap-logging-integration passes all validation criteria. Implementation correctly integrates zap with structured JSON output to stderr, --log-level flag with debug/info/warn/error support and info default, and UUID v4 traceId generation with MAPJ_TRACE_ID override. Unit tests pass. Minor non-blocking issues around thread safety and silent level defaults noted.
